textByHash.a8d9f436ade746266390485390dc3d2bb5009452: Sir Prysin? Who's that? What would I want his key for?
textByHash.ffe7ef922ea86193cd2f801a8e76cd95b8d476c6: That wasn't very clever of him. I'd lose my head if it wasn't screwed on. Go and tell him to find someone else to look after his valuables in future.
textByHash.78b59db74467bf336ce83a3bcd11e9ae27d9f815: Oh that's great, if it wouldn't be too much trouble.
textByHash.486c298077a664d21793d0b144689840520adeb7: Oh ok, have a good time, and watch out for sheep! They're more cunning than they look.
textByHash.47d4f13c8d13d32b3f8f83e6b15f116f10b6f5f4: Say, I remember one of the King's knights. He had nice shoes...
textByHash.c0d412773d3bb779a4db1844d90ef4b328761f7c: ...and didn't like my homemade spinach rolls. Would you like a spinach roll?
textByHash.3b30958b6496ef6d21c7fb76bb654a4edaca4cf0: The key? The key to what?
textByHash.06ce5682ba8bdc2cfe3897bdfd53736f6a1b9f1e: There's more than one key in the world don't you know? Would be a bit odd if there was only the one.
textByHash.f483cd05a3c4d1aaf518268b7068b552cc4dae6e: Silverlight? Never heard of that. Sounds a good name for a ship. Are you sure it's not the name of a ship rather than a sword?
textByHash.d7bc0dc051f06f40575284a4bcb9f9a97507b40f: That's a pity, waste of a name.
textByHash.8b4d1447f69b4df9b9cac6874fafe7f2c14f8486: Me? Lose things? That's a nasty accusation.
textByHash.2d035cba6462cc901b892f44b685c0061a24c5cd: Now you come to mention it, yes I do have a key. It's in my special closet of valuable stuff. Now how do I get into that?
textByHash.2ec7fbbca2f458cbadfeea0a891427c6426e94b3: I sealed it using one of my magic rituals. So it would make sense that another ritual would open it again.
textByHash.0e3123b9157df7c790deceeb722e83d58b32b213: Yes a simple drazier style ritual should suffice. Hmm, main problem with that is I'll need 25 sets of bones. Now where am I going to get hold of something like that?
textByHash.7c81baff4b6f2f7632b90252010e54b4d7863aad: Ah well, sorry I couldn't be any more help.
textByHash.05a3466df56f8f0b36e7815ab68a489a3c06f4d2: Ooh that would be very good of you.
textByHash.536c12ceff3888058ab3ae6295a83b56ffeb9d40: How are you doing finding bones?
textByHash.8bd5f2439c901ef7214a1b494bee0066fee17591: Hurrah! That's all 25 sets of bones.
textByHash.f768ea54d13f1a239606ae6ee7d8050d707be755: Wings of dark and colour too, Spreading in the morning dew; Locked away I have a key; Return it now, please, unto me.
textByHash.dfab830ca02a92b236a3eff039880e0e66e567d1: Not a problem for a friend of Sir What's-his-face.
textByHash.a520a0e1908fab6ea8344b683ec30f3a04099ce8: Don't you have somewhere to be, young thingummywut? You still have that key you asked me for.
textByHash.03b3ac5eb6ae96a9984d2b0a9e2b8e41594b885d: Yes I know, it was returned to me. If you want it back you're going to have to collect another 25 sets of bones.
textByHash.febdeb54f441e28ed46a8471b5aacf80a52ebf53: You don't look like you have a problem.
textByHash.ee256aceeb28f27fc6ce0d657e0d8e7411d40343: Mmmmm. Cake of Guidance. Yummy Yum! Did you know they're imbued with knowledge and information itself? When eaten it will give anyone the guidance they need to get back on track. So you say you're a chef?
textByHash.7a1aa5f3a4388e032a72a4ce986f568df2bd589c: Oh dear, it's a strange day when the Lumbridge Guide needs guidance. Don't worry, I shall help you make your chocolate cake.
textByHash.4cea92526dee0d538a88b1c9254e253bf0f48db6: You don't know? Deary me. You'll need to enchant three ingredients with your own knowledge. Bring me the basic ingredients and I will help you with the enchantment.
textByHash.c4fc2290aa96bbf51f4c4049e39b06786d4d22d8: An eggy peggy, some floury woury and some milky wilky.
textByHash.785e46870bf83f2a216299648ea292fa056fcf63: I need you to bring me...
textByHash.7e40e8be469bd0256c0349020ce7f9e041a750fd: I will then enchant them for you so you can make your Chocolate cake!
textByHash.999ccdf3f45e2cc4169fba1288f0fb2acec4bfdd: Of course. Take care, and don't talk to strangers!
textByHash.0a5440058eef3fce512ea5f72c384b69c5ff9a77: Boo. Hiss. You're no fun. I will need your help for the enchantment - you must imbue it with knowledge itself. You must complete a quiz to enact the enchantment.
textByHash.b77695c454b1ac73823b646d0cd4677811f3304b: Okay. You will be presented with some people that you may have come across on your travels - it's up to you to recall their names. Guess three correctly without error and you will succeed in enchanting the egg.
textByHash.dfec010df7f92a17eea25cb738775a463bc428b2: Correct - and now the second character:
textByHash.f3ecd6e3b6093a80f1c13cc38860f6a026ca6dd4: Correct - and now the third and final character:
textByHash.c608dd34921dd66f65901af922fa12485a74a550: Well, there is the case of the magic words of enchantment - repeat after me:
textByHash.e623469fca7b75fa511d4a40a3b9bdefce71239a: Not quite, but it'll do. I will hold onto the Enchanted Egg for you until you need it.
textByHash.9159e48720210beedb2ad92cc474afe09ea3e4f9: Indeed, best you go bake the cake! You can do it the same way as making an ordinary cake.
textByHash.64edbfeb88899405e9d16aae03bafa1bf1f89398: Nope, that's not right, you'll have to start again.
textByHash.f0ba22d46a1de8806888568724d3c42b5e10b8dc: Okie dokey, watch out for evil cows.
textByHash.63de88cfa44c9c974cd027e10c0223d95ce42606: Mmmm milk. By all means, you're going to have to complete a quiz first to bring forth guidance and enact the enchantment.
textByHash.fcdd48a268a408731597f0c098dfcc0c86c835a4: Okay. You must answer 3 general questions about our lands correctly without getting one wrong. You have as many chances as you need.
textByHash.9fb03caaf4db9d030bd1589c0d14b5d87ef84e17: Correct! Good job! Two more to go.
textByHash.577c5b9d56e821e141f781e45649bba4bc609af2: Correct! Well done. One more to go.
textByHash.f1fae724d2ba8290199ead92a6ac22d413e2be83: Correct! Well done. That's all three answered!
textByHash.e0c3bae41b9c61da356cf7acbe9095e74001e5cd: ....Close enough. The milk has now been enchanted!
textByHash.21e3660ca53f49bbb2ad001bd1a7af5224a4cfb4: How dare you! Now get me the next ingredient! I will hold onto the Enchanted Milk for you until you need it.
textByHash.d6bab2db7e822ccde040c32540b860cd2b0e2e6b: That's not right. You'll have to start again.
textByHash.fb1b5caf811e5ab86584ed5e0f247d029a5a2549: So you want to enchant it now? You'll have to take active part by completing a little quiz to imbue the flour with knowledge and enact the enchantment.
textByHash.3edb4414c15670033f00fab16bd5a0464b15d5b5: For enchanting this item you will be shown a selection of items, when you stop viewing this selection you'll have to answer three questions correctly in a row and then the flour will be enchanted with guidance.
textByHash.bb035434f7b05d545d1f9d56c20410a32aee3dc7: That's correct - onto the second set!
textByHash.d39e2b464d00a9b22d7b1586765c6b47f4fcb77d: Correct - and now the third and final set:
textByHash.5457b0e8b2cc051618e47c3e9e1c4648b6804176: You have to repeat the magic words of course!
textByHash.f16ef2c5dc4b74def31710d7b2c19434cc27ce1e: We shall make a wizard of you yet. I will hold onto the enchanted flour for you until you need it.
textByHash.5f714c3f8cd535ef9bb634446c6c0d4b63862cd1: Sorry, that's not right. You'll have to start again.
textByHash.92b591d04c0689890e6c265b5cd645ddf14d4fee: That's okay, I have another up my sleeve.
textByHash.f76867910ab95c4ad0c669edd0d80f363489c8e5: Good job I have another to hand then isn't it!
textByHash.9dd01f18530e8417e03fa8e2eb3ac2ed5ef357f9: What would you do without me? I can give you another...
textByHash.34d3b4fe93c3a20ea3d463942f0da93c1bc10f7e: Oopsy daisy! You'll have to make another one!
textByHash.4c9c28f4f46ed8365ad857fc804b664a1cf99f54: Right now? But we're having a party!
textByHash.8afdc8a97a10d3db8427d5b4abfae7782ae04106: Well I suppose it is a party of sorts. A study party! Would you like to join in? You look like you could use one!
textByHash.f674d91ca6126b35b6e9116b5c8d98a85e6295fd: Teleportation matrix? Doesn't sound like the most comfortable place for a party... I bet it's full of thingummywuts as well!
textByHash.bd2528cf683cc1af618d0d7134f7c1db821008ef: Cancel the party? You're certainly a party pooper!
textByHash.7adb0a6c442148a29f40879b9f24fa1dc3a3fe0b: Finish it with a bang? Sedridor won't be happy if we burn the place down again, will he? Still, I like it!
textByHash.0b6191689d648f6bbfa17bf06f6feee44fdd8916: I've currently tasked each of the apprentices with solving a problem. If they all solve it, we can celebrate together!
textByHash.0452aa9aa6f50e9c8cfb3ddd4fd4ae3bf66b29f0: Problem? There's no problem! Everything is fine here. We're having a party!
textByHash.e7b31a147d8a4e1258f9b956a6b38f49d1e80665: Oh! It's trivial! They just have to figure out what a thingummywut is!
textByHash.e2a008085515cdcf85bd2818c1d021f3de8406ae: A slayer creature? That doesn't make any sense at all! Besides, not even the slayer masters know how to kill a thingummywut!
textByHash.65c2fa39149abccd1f8596b4a2fe7744aedcf18a: Perhaps my apprentices could teach you a thing or three. You should talk to them.
textByHash.ed22fc1f6901dc55fa3818af4a4dc967cdc21582: Lost to history? That doesn't make any sense at all! Besides, a thingummywut is not lost to history. It's very well documented inside my head!
textByHash.c86cdec8144ee7d96b6eaf818be244bfb09ddca2: Me? That doesn't make any sense at all! If I were a thingummywut, I wouldn't be stood here teaching!
textByHash.bc7fce61c491c80344f363fdfc19c841bb81f3a6: Oh dear, how embarrassing. Perhaps my apprentices could teach you a thing or three. You should talk to them.
textByHash.f80232fb7b238d1598e26bfb7ba91141719a2d64: See, it's easier to solve problems when you put aside what's best for you and instead focus on what's best for the team!
textByHash.66676bb386668c6047ad711dad1c0a444b35684f: Oh? Did I? I forgot. Either way, I hope you've all now learnt a valuable lesson in teamwork! You have this adventurer here to thank for that.
textByHash.8eebce80bcd9c82542252ecb1324c0f445325bc2: Now, finish with a bang did you say?
textByHash.c865b7ff1b1f9ad277fea5e7e117dd738760d9d2: Well, it was your idea after all. Now why don't you go tell Sedridor that my apprentices are free to help?
textByHash.a64aaba94220a4135b4880489ee62af843b3a067: No, that's not right at all. You should think harder about this!
textByHash.81884385ae832f7d7899d5bb681bec3f283f91c8: That's right, young thingummywut. Now, don't keep Sedridor waiting!
textByHash.1ca5862d5779af2e9279e1ebd41ffb969eb8aebd: Come now, Sedridor. The young thingummywuts have proven themselves to be more than capable. Let them have their party!
textByHash.af82738b0bcb6a7684174bc3afeded8663544892: Those pesky thingummywuts. They get everywhere. They leave a terrible mess too.
textByHash.a4ac40fb43e9829e0350eb71a32b27de6731a5cd: You're a thingummywut? I've never seen one up close before. They said I was mad!
textByHash.ca4a960a5c8b3e82c20133f15ac1a39403bec67a: Now you are my proof! There ARE thingummywuts in this tower. Now where can I find a cage big enough to keep you?
textByHash.a53e0c737262f550090b85618a02594ce5cea5c0: That's a pity. I thought maybe they were winding me up.
textByHash.9464fd026167686ed0564e0d7bbb4801b0033a8c: Don't be ridiculous. No-one has ever seen one.
textByHash.7c053b5e4f09d211b7fb626ae3ed4ca8bf88fec8: They're invisible, or a myth, or a figment of my imagination. Can't remember which right now.
textByHash.11ded9ee0bdc614dec28f05d0641fde5577dbf97: Wizard eh? You don't want any truck with that sort. They're not to be trusted. That's what I've heard anyways.
textByHash.8365de1e8084c6d657eb81e0985fe17a65bfb443: How dare you? Of course I'm a wizard. Now don't be so cheeky or I'll turn you into a frog.
textByHash.5cb04994891c6f5d2d36ddb2f7ec23f41266dc18: Cheerio then. It was nice chatting to you.
textByHash.9181e3ccf699e1829c2a5ca6bbf26fd17980821a: I need you to answer this for me like a good thingummywut.
textByHash.88a793984fb5f17634fb692967165473fbc01b52: Please give me your answer, young thingummywut!
textByHash.a6985a9304736d723a14b0fe2ba6aade9ee364d3: How can that be? Go check again, silly thingummywut!
